title: 3D Chiseled Bookshelf Variants
description: Vanilla Tweaks 3D Chiseled Bookshelf support for More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants
body:
# Overview

Finally released these models as a standalone resourcepack from our modpack [CoreCraft](https://modrinth.com/modpack/corecraft/version/2.0.0-beta1).

This resourcepack makes [More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants](https://modrinth.com/project/vkun3O1z) 3D.

For 3D chiseled oak bookshelf, please download it from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) in the 3D section.

![3D Spruce Chiseled Bookshelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ePjFWvLk/images/44abf890d3fa0b046e09e4bd41f9e0aa7bc05d9d.webp)

For **3D Bookshelves and Lecterns**: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-bookshelf-variants
Check out similar projects here: https://modrinth.com/collection/N35iau5q

# Credits
- Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/ (Especially [Stridey](https://modrinth.com/user/31j7L936) for the vanilla models)
- More Chiseled Bookshelf Variants: https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chiseled-bookshelf-variants
